positive: Highly detailed, minimalist vector illustration of an ethereal celestial botanical scene. Subject includes stylized crescent moons, glowing stylized crescent moon, abstract geometric plant life, and winding cosmic roots. Composition must be centrally balanced, utilizing strong negative space around the primary subject mass. The style should emulate deep midnight blue and iridescent teal linocut engraving, with bioluminescent gold foil accents. Focus on clean silhouettes, sharp line art, high contrast, and symmetrical arrangement. Artwork must be suitable for apparel printing, featuring bold lines and graphic separation. Studio lighting, perfect clarity, maximal detail, symmetry, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, amateur, artifacts, noise, lowres, watermark, text, writing, messy, ugly, jpeg artifacts, bad composition, extra limbs, malformed, poorly rendered hands, dirty
